@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "alertmanager-4513-jira-integration-deprecated-endpoints",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "alertmanager: Jira Integration deprecated Endpoints",
+    "description": "Jira Integration deprecated Endpoints. This issue affects 6+ users.",
+    "type": "upgrade",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify alertmanager upgrade symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your alertmanager deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=alertmanager\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=alertmanager -n alertmanager --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review alertmanager configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant alertmanager configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=alertmanager\nkubectl get configmap -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=alertmanager\n```\nCreating a Jira Ticket via the Jira Integration resulting in a HTTP 401 followed by a deprecation"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Jira Integration deprecated Endpoints",
+        "description": "After a [chat](https://cloud-native.slack.com/archives/C01AUBA4PFE/p1757006154523549) with , I would like to share a proposal to solve this issue:\n\n### Proposal\n\nIntroduce a new configuration toggle `api_type` to control which Jira API the notifier uses.\n\n### Motivation\n\nCurrently, the notifier relies on a single code path that supports Jira Data Center APIs and Jira Cloud APIs which are deprecated. This causes problems for Jira Cloud users, since newer endpoints are required for issue\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Jira Integration deprecated Endpoints is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=alertmanager -n alertmanager --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n alertmanager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "After a [chat](https://cloud-native.slack.com/archives/C01AUBA4PFE/p1757006154523549) with , I would like to share a proposal to solve this issue:\n\n### Proposal\n\nIntroduce a new configuration toggle `api_type` to control which Jira API the notifier uses.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "alertmanager",
+      "graduated",
+      "observability",
+      "upgrade"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "alertmanager"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "upgrade"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/prometheus/alertmanager/issues/4513",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/prometheus/alertmanager"
+    },
+    "reactions": 6,
+    "comments": 9,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with alertmanager installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-03T06:33:09.134Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
